title: Wafer maps
text:
import plotnine as pn
pn.theme_set(pn.theme_minimal())

from slimnine.example_data import load_wafer_dataset
from slimnine.wafer_maps import (
    WaferMapConfig,
    plot_wafermap_diverge,
    plot_wafermap_passfail,
    plot_wafermap_spectral,
)

df = load_wafer_dataset()
df.shape
kpis = ['vt', 'idsat', 'ileak', 'freq']

title: Wafer maps
text:
import plotnine as pn
pn.theme_set(pn.theme_minimal())

from slimnine.example_data import load_wafer_dataset
from slimnine.wafer_maps import (
    WaferMapConfig,
    plot_wafermap_diverge,
    plot_wafermap_passfail,
    plot_wafermap_spectral,
)

df = load_wafer_dataset()
df.shape
kpis = ['vt', 'idsat', 'ileak', 'freq']

title: Wafer maps
text:
KPI spectral
A lot_id × wafer_no grid surfaces both lot-level shifts (rows) and within-lot variation (columns).

cfg = WaferMapConfig(
    facet=pn.facet_wrap("wafer_id", nrow = 3),
    fig_size=(14, 8),
    panel_spacing=0.01
)

for kpi in kpis:
    plot = plot_wafermap_spectral(df, kpi=kpi, cfg=cfg)
    plot.show()

title: slimnine examples
text: Worked examples for the slimnine plotting helpers, run against the bundled synthetic wafer dataset.

title: slimnine examples
text:
Rendering
From the repo root, with the project venv active:
uv run quarto render docs           # render the whole site to docs/_site
uv run quarto preview docs          # live preview on localhost
uv run quarto render docs/examples/wafer_maps.qmd   # one document
